title: Children's 48" (4ft) Round Plywood Table W / Folding Legs
features: Tables are made of high quality 3/4" solid plywood
Tabletops are sealed with polyurethane, water-resistant protective high gloss coating.
Table edges are finished with heavy-duty rubber "T" style molding.
Full-length hardwood runners to add additional support.
Wishbone style, 15 gauge powder-coated steel legs.
Legs have a positive locking mechanism.
All plywood tables include 2 1/4" runners to protect tabletops from folded legs during storage and transport.
We are the manufacturer, no middle man

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 50 or more
